name: Western Union
description_short: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution offering auto loans, checking/savings accounts, certificates, and boat loans across Oklahoma locations.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a federally chartered credit union serving members in the Tulsa, Oklahoma area and surrounding communities. Founded on principles of member service, WSFCU operates as a not-for-profit institution focused on delivering competitive rates and personalized financial services to its membership base. The credit union maintains multiple branch locations including offices in Broken Arrow (main), Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa, with extended drive-through and Saturday hours for member convenience.

WSFCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles), boat loans, checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit. Their flagship product appears to be auto financing with rates advertised as low as 5.49% APR, complemented by a Kasasa Cash Back Checking account offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases. The credit union also provides online banking, financial education resources, and loan application services both online and in-person.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through community engagement, evident in their news section documenting events like annual shred days, car shows, electronics recycling programs, and donations to local schools. The organization maintains an emphasis on member education, publishing content on topics ranging from credit scores and debt management to fraud prevention and safe shopping practices. Their mission statement explicitly commits to friendly, professional service and competitive electronic financial services tailored to member needs.

As a credit union, WSFCU operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance and serves a defined membership base, primarily in Oklahoma. While they offer standard consumer products competitive with banks and other credit unions, their service area and membership eligibility may be limited compared to national financial institutions. The website content does not detail membership requirements, fee structures, or comparative advantages versus competitors.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR on new vehicles with online and in-person application options
Kasasa Cash Back Checking with 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple Oklahoma branch locations with extended hours including Saturday drive-through service
Certificate rates up to 3.46% APY providing competitive savings yields
Boat loans available at 7.64% APR, a specialized product not all institutions offer
Active community engagement including member education on financial topics and local events
On-site ATMs at branches for member convenience and cash access
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted primarily to Oklahoma, unsuitable for out-of-state members
Website does not disclose membership eligibility requirements or how to qualify for membership
No information provided about fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
Limited detail on mortgage lending beyond mention of 'mortgage loans' — rates, terms, and product specifics unclear
Website does not specify whether membership is occupation-based, community-based, or open to anyone in service area
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto loans with local branch support and personalized service
Debit card users wanting cash back rewards through checking account
Members prioritizing community-focused financial institutions with active local involvement
Boat owners needing specialized marine financing options
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best suited for Oklahoma residents who prioritize community banking, competitive auto lending rates, and local branch relationships. Primary caveat: membership eligibility and geographic restrictions are not clearly detailed on their website, and interested consumers should contact WSFCU directly to confirm they qualify for membership before applying.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles) as low as 5.49% APR
Boat loans as low as 7.64% APR
Kasasa Cash Back Checking with 3% rewards on debit purchases
Money Market accounts up to 1.20% APY
Certificates of Deposit up to 3.46% APY
Branch and ATM access across multiple Oklahoma locations
Free auto buying resource for vehicle shopping
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
